questionHtml: Calculate the difference in time between 40 % of children receiving the hepatitis B vaccine and 40 % receiving the pneumococcal vaccine.
markschemeHtml:
13 years;

Allow any value between 13 and 14 years inclusive.

meta.title: Calculate the difference in time between 40 % of children receiving the hepatitis B vaccine and 40 % receiving the pneumococcal vaccine.
